why_not_others: AI customer support assistant – moderate feasibility and higher data‑privacy risk lower its overall score; pilot suitability and adoption are only average.

AI sales proposal generator – while low risk and easy to pilot, its business value and feasibility are slightly lower than the HR assistant and it still requires brand/legal review that adds overhead.
AI contract risk analyzer – highest business value but very high implementation complexity, low feasibility, and significant legal risk make it unsuitable for a 90‑day pilot.
final_recommendation: Start with a 90‑day pilot of the AI internal HR policy assistant. It delivers strong business value through cost savings and high employee usage, is quick to implement, carries moderate risk, and enjoys very high adoption potential. After validating impact and governance, the organization can then evaluate the AI sales proposal generator as a secondary initiative to capture revenue upside with similarly low risk.
